description: Surveys the manga (Japanese comicbook) from its precursors in premodern woodblock-printed booklets to its contemporary manifestations in subgenres like shonen, gekiga, mecha, and shojo. Draws upon critical writings on visual culture, literature, and visual-verbal narrative. Not open to students with credit for E ASIAN 376 prior to Fall 2019

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 104(or E ASIAN 104 prior to Summer 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 203
